name: benign_assert
description: fetch_setting returns None; apply_setting uses the result twice without a guard. Buggy version has two attribute consumers. Fixed version uses assert to narrow value to NonNull before use — tests the Assume fact path. The fixed version must produce zero regressions.
analysis_note: BUGGY: fetch_setting base_return=Nullable. value=Nullable → Consumer(value, Attribute) fires twice. FIXED: after NullFact::Assume(BranchCondition{symbol:'value', on_true:NonNull}), env[value]=NonNull → no Consumer fires. Tests that assert guards are respected.
task: apply_setting() calls fetch_setting() which returns None, then dereferences the result in two places without checking. Add an assertion or guard that ensures value is not None before the dereferences.
